# Upstream release tags and ranges already triaged for this standalone repository.
#
# Accepted grammar (strict literal matching):
#   1) <tag>
#   2) <owner/repo>@<tag>
#   3) <base>..<head>
#   4) <owner/repo>@<base>..<head>
#
# Rules:
# - Blank lines and lines beginning with '#' are ignored.
# - Bare entries (formats 1 and 3) apply only to the default upstream:
#   droserasprout/io.drsr.hotspotadb
# - An overridden upstream must use tuple form (formats 2 or 4).
# - Matching never normalizes 'v' prefixes or other ref spelling.
# - Malformed entries fail the monitor instead of being silently ignored.
# - Remove an entry to permit normal monitoring for that exact identity again.

# Baseline at standalone cutover:
v1.0.0
